name: my-agent-plugins
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins: native desktop notifications, HTML code-review report tools, and coding guideline skills

plugins.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
plugins.description: A plugin that provides tips and insights from Andrej Karpathy's talks and writings.

plugins.name: notifier
plugins.description: Cross-platform native notifications (Windows Toast / macOS) for Claude Code hook events

plugins.name: code-review-to-html
plugins.description: Convert code review markdown reports into an interactive, self-contained HTML viewer.

plugins.name: code-review-helper
plugins.description: Generate an interactive, self-contained HTML code-review report that walks a reviewer through a set of changes as a pipeline.
